---
name: Release Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[RELEASE REQUEST]"
labels: release_request
assignees: ''

---

**New `pyds` version**
The `pyds` version that should be supported.

**Link to Release**
The link to the github tagged release of `pyds` (e.g. https://github.com/NVIDIA-AI-IOT/deepstream_python_apps/releases/tag/v1.2.0).

**Special notes to consider**
Notes that are relevant for the stub creation or special behaviours of the `pyds` release.
